objective: Regime PM v4 smoke: test deployment-gap sizing in a rebound environment. PM must compute target exposure gap, avoid counting RiskGuard-blocked orders, and allocate gap across viable candidates.

variables.custom: Only PM regime deployment discipline changed. Analysts, model, data, indicators, stock pool, and RiskGuard hard limits stay fixed.

fixed_indicators.description: Fixed trend snapshot: close, SMA20/SMA60, MACD, RSI14.
Fixed momentum/risk snapshot: 5d/10d/20d returns and 20d volatility.
